subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! The dwelling lieth in ruins and its master is held captive among the factions. Soon shall be made manifest that which hath been ordained for the House. Verily, He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله مضیف خراب و صاحب آن اسیر احزاب سوف یظهر ما قدر للبیت انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @degrees of faith; certitude, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
